# PMO - Project Patterns & Guidelines

## Quick Reference

- **Project Type**: nodejs
- **Created**: 2026-03-23
- **Repository**: https://github.com/TrustNetT/PMO
- **Organization**: TrustNetT

## Workflow

1. **Development**: Work in `pmo-wip/` (private)
2. **Testing**: Run tests before committing
3. **Publishing**: Use `./tools/publish-pmo` to sync to public
4. **Distribution**: Public repo at `PMO/`

## Key Files

- `README.md` - Project overview
- `activity/status/current-context.md` - Session tracking
- `activity/vibe/ai-instructions.md` - Detailed AI guidance
- `docs/` - Technical documentation

## For More Information

See:
- `activity/vibe/ai-instructions.md` - Detailed project-specific guidance
- Parent PMO documentation
- GitHub repository README
